user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the recruitment and onboarding notification templates list, so that I can manage candidate and joining notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns Template Type ID, Notification type, Description and Task

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to open and view a specific notification template such as Offer Approval Notification, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the notification templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the notification templates list, so that I can access all 14 templates across pages
acceptance_criteria: Given the list shows 10 of 14 items; When I click Next; Then the following page of templates is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the notification templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view, so that I can manage the email channel alongside notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
